title: OSDUE Light Up Saber with Sound, 2 Pack 7 Color Retractable Lightsaber for Kids, LED Light Saber Sword Toy for Boys Kids Teenagers Gift Halloween Dress Up Parties, Fashion Cosplay Toy for Adults
features: 【Cool Lighting and Sound Effect】 With a built-in sound generator designed on the hilt of the light sword to make a clear and vivid imitation sound when hitting. And it provides 7 colors changing, 6 flashing modes can be switched, glowing in the dark, and illuminating the scene, attracting children's eyes.

【High-quality materials】 The light-up saber is made of high-quality soft plastic material, which is durable and sturdy, BPA-free, safe and non-toxic for kids, And the metal handle is easy to handle and grip, help children exercise finger flexibility.（NOTE: 3 batteries need to be added.）

【Light Sabers for Teens】Press the button on the handle to start the light-up sword. press one time switch to change one color. Integrated with a special combat sound effect and light flash mode, LED lightsaber brings a vivid and real combat experience.

【Suit for Users and Scenes】lightsaber is adults and children led light saber toy, a great gift for friends and family, suit for cosplay, training, sports, for fun, swordsmanship etc.You can feel like a real Jedi.

【Wide Application】The lightsaber is suitable for galaxy fighters-themed parties, Halloween costume accessories, office stress relief, shows, movies, or cosplay props and treats. An ideal Christmas, Halloween, birthday gift for kids.
description: Product Description How to use: 1. Press for the first time: light sound effect; 2. Press the second time: red light sound effect; 3. Press the third time: green light sound effect; 4. Fourth press: blue light effect; 5. Press the fifth note: turn off the sound effect; 6. Press the sixth key: hear the sound of the sword being withdrawn from the sheath, immediately turn off the lights and sound effects completely; 7. Press and hold the button for 3 seconds, lock the light color when you hear the sound, and press it again to change the color. The length of the one piece lightsaber is 80cm, 2 pieces of lightsaber can be connected to make a longer lightsaber (160cm), includes a connector. Packaging Includes: 2 X 80 cm Lightsabers + 1 X Connector Specific: Material: Plastic Light Color: 7 Color RGB Light Square Switch: Volume Key Switch Round Switch: Light Switch Button Battery Type: 3 X AAA (Not Included) With movement and battle simulation, when performing different battle actions and punches, different sounds will be produced. This RGB lightsaber can be connected in two parts, which can be customized according to your needs. the handle and blade can also be removed, which is very portable and convenient. The LED lightsaber can emit 7 different colors for you to choose, which can be used in different entertainment scenarios, the RGB lightsaber brings you a vivid and real fighting experience.
